title:
Where should we be going?
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Where should we be going?
What do you think data.govt.nz should provide, now and in the future?
Sometimes it's important to take a few steps back and re-imagine the future, so that we can make sure we are still heading in the right direction for you. Over the next few weeks we'll be doing just that: taking stock of the last two years, and identifying where you need us to be at the end of 2022.
We can't do that without your help.
Tell us what you think, and what you want, by completing our short survey – it will only take 3-5 minutes.
Fill in the survey here - The survey closed Jan, 2021. Thank you to all of those who contributed.
Your feedback will help us revise the goal and purpose of the data.govt.nz website and decide priorities as we plan future technical features and website content.
Thanks in anticipation!
Photo by Matt Noble on Unsplash
